profile.bio: Marketplace-operated provider account for curated external API listings.

service.name: StableEnrich Google Maps API
service.tagline: Google Maps text, nearby, and place-detail APIs for agents.
service.about: Discovery-only listing for StableEnrich Google Maps endpoints. Fast lists the provider metadata only; calls go directly to StableEnrich.
service.promptIntro: Use this listing to discover StableEnrich Google Maps endpoints for local business search and place detail workflows.
setupInstructions: Review the provider docs before calling any endpoint.
Authenticate directly with the provider as required by the provider.
Authenticate directly with StableEnrich as required by the provider.
